aiTools.name: Bolt.new
aiTools.howItWorks: Converts plain text into a fully functional website using AI.
aiTools.purpose: Generate simple web pages quickly without coding

aiTools.name: Replit Agent
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses AI to interpret text-based instructions and generate functional software code.
aiTools.purpose: Help developers and non-coders build software quickly

aiTools.name: Claude
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses natural language processing to assist with writing, summarizing, and content creation.
aiTools.purpose: Help with writing tasks, idea generation, and text refinement

aiTools.name: Midjourney
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses deep learning to generate high-quality images from text descriptions.
aiTools.purpose: Create logos, artwork, and concept designs

aiTools.name: Runway AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses AI to generate, edit, and enhance videos with minimal manual input.
aiTools.purpose: Enable video creation, special effects, and animations

aiTools.name: Zapier
aiTools.howItWorks: Connects different web apps and automates repetitive tasks using 'Zaps' (workflow automation rules).
aiTools.purpose: Automate tasks like data transfers, email alerts, and social media posting without coding

aiTools.name: Make.com
aiTools.howItWorks: Provides a drag-and-drop interface to automate workflows across apps and services.
aiTools.purpose: Create complex automation workflows visually without needing to write code

aiTools.name: PromptMetheus
aiTools.howItWorks: Optimizes AI-generated prompts for better performance in large language models.
aiTools.purpose: Refine and test AI prompts for chatbots, content generation, and AI automation

aiTools.name: Postman
aiTools.howItWorks: Provides an AI-powered assistant (Postbot) for generating, testing, and automating API requests.
aiTools.purpose: Simplify API development, debugging, and documentation for developers

aiTools.name: Suno
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses generative AI models to compose and produce original songs from text prompts.
aiTools.purpose: Generate music in various styles and genres instantly

aiTools.name: Replicate
aiTools.howItWorks: Provides access to pre-trained AI models for tasks like image generation, text analysis, and data processing.
aiTools.purpose: Allow developers to run AI models on-demand without setting up infrastructure

aiTools.name: Descript
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses AI to edit videos and audio by transcribing spoken words and allowing text-based editing.
aiTools.purpose: Enable users to edit media by simply modifying the text transcript

aiTools.name: Opus
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses AI to generate engaging short-form videos optimized for social media platforms.
aiTools.purpose: Convert longer content into short, catchy clips for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

aiTools.name: Study Fetch
aiTools.howItWorks: Utilizes AI to help students with studying, research, and content generation by processing large amounts of academic material.
aiTools.purpose: Generate summaries, create flashcards, help with essay writing, and improve study productivity

aiTools.name: Perplexity AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Combines large language models with search capabilities to provide detailed answers with citations.
aiTools.purpose: Offer summarized search results and research presentations

aiTools.name: LockedIn AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses AI to assist users during interviews and professional meetings by providing real-time answers and tailored feedback.
aiTools.purpose: Enhance communication skills and boost confidence in professional settings

aiTools.name: Motion AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Integrates AI into task management to help users plan their day by automatically scheduling tasks, meetings, and breaks.
aiTools.purpose: Optimize daily schedules, prioritize tasks, and enhance productivity

aiTools.name: Tome AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Leverages AI to assist in creating presentations by generating content, designing slides, and organizing information.
aiTools.purpose: Simplify professional presentation creation and ensure cohesive design

aiTools.name: Pictory AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Transforms text content into engaging videos using AI by analyzing text to select relevant visuals and audio.
aiTools.purpose: Create compelling videos for marketing, education, or entertainment

aiTools.name: Taskade AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Integrates AI into a collaborative workspace for task creation, project management, and team communication.
aiTools.purpose: Enhance team productivity by automating task assignments and generating project outlines

aiTools.name: HyperWrite AI
aiTools.howItWorks: Uses advanced language models to assist with writing tasks, providing suggestions and generating content.
aiTools.purpose: Aid in drafting emails, articles, and other written content
